issuingAuthority: Van Anumodan Rule Governance — verify and obtain competent-authority approval before production gating
note: Clause-level starter set with verified instrument names, gazette numbers and dates. Confirm exact sub-clauses and current NPV/CA rates against the official source before a rule gates any decision. When an amendment or clarification is issued, add a new row (or set 'super' on the one it replaces) and bump libraryVersion + updated.

rules.subject: B Legal Status
rules.clause: Section 2 — restriction on de-reservation & use of forest land for non-forest purpose
rules.notes: Parent statute (Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980 renamed by the 2023 amendment). Prior approval of the Central Government is mandatory for de-reservation or non-forest use. Basis for checks A12/A15, B01-B03, S01/S03.

rules.subject: B Legal Status
rules.notes: Applicability and exclusions inserted by the 2023 amendment. Mandatory legal-review trigger for checks B06 and B07; read with the sub-section 1A(3) clarifications dated 24.09.2024 and 06.10.2024 and the proviso 1A(1)(b) clarification dated 27.09.2024 (see R-009).

rules.subject: A/O/P Governance
rules.clause: Section 3 — Advisory Committee; Section 4 — power to make rules
rules.notes: Advisory Committee for advice on approvals; Section 4(1) is the rule-making power under which the 2023 Rules were made. Relevant to processing-route checks A15, O/P scrutiny.

rules.subject: A/E/O/P Procedure
rules.clause: Principal rules (Rules 1-19) — approval process, SIR, PSC, REC, two-stage approval
rules.notes: [G.S.R. 869(E)] Notified 29.11.2023, in force 01.12.2023, in supersession of the Forest (Conservation) Rules, 2022. Project Screening Committee (State), Regional Empowered Committee (RO) and Advisory Committee; 'In-Principle' then 'Final' approval. Governs DFO/CF/Nodal roles and PARIVESH 2.0 timelines — checks A, E, O, P.

rules.subject: A/P Procedure
rules.notes: Specific sub-rules clarified by MoEFCC guideline dated 29.11.2024. Confirm exact text; relevant to processing-route and stage checks A15, P01/P07.

rules.subject: I Compensatory Afforestation
rules.clause: Rule 13(1) — substitution of provisos (CA / accredited CA land)
rules.notes: [G.S.R. 582(E)] Amends Rule 13 of the 2023 Rules on compensatory afforestation / accredited CA land. Confirm exact gazette date and provision text before gating CA checks I01-I15. Read with 01.10.2024 clarification on accredited CA for NHAI road projects.

rules.subject: B/A/E Consolidated guidance
rules.act: Consolidated Guidelines & Clarifications under the Adhiniyam, 1980 and Rules, 2023
rules.clause: MoEFCC consolidated guidelines (as amended by clarifications)
rules.notes: Living document. Track clarifications: 13.05.2025 (para 4.2(iv)), 25.03.2025 (Ch.7 para 7.4(i)), 07.04.2025 (mining approval process), 22.11.2024 (timelines — R-008), 29.11.2024 (Rule 11(10)/16(8) — R-005), 19.11.2024 (streamlining). Add each as its own row when it materially affects a check.

rules.subject: A/P Timelines
rules.clause: Review of processing timelines vs. Rules, 2023 on PARIVESH 2.0
rules.notes: Timelines for processing authorities in States/UTs against the prescribed limits under the 2023 Rules. Supports SIR/recommendation stage tracking (checks E01, O01, P06).

rules.subject: B Legal Status
rules.notes: Clarify scope of Section 1A applicability/exemptions and effect of change in land status during settlement (Odisha reference). Directly informs the mandatory Section 1A examination — checks B06, B07, P02.

rules.subject: N Project-Specific / Working permission
rules.clause: Linear proposals 01.10.2024; transmission working permission 10.09.2024; railway preparatory works 27.11.2024; works after Working Plan expiry 24.09.2024; ropeways 29.11.2024
rules.notes: Project-type specific processing under the Adhiniyam read with WLPA 1972 for linear projects. Activates checks N02 (roads), N03 (transmission), N06 (pipeline/OFC) and violation/working-permission checks H01/H05.

rules.subject: G Alternatives and Site Specificity
rules.clause: Site specificity of small public utilities vis-a-vis forest diversion
rules.notes: Site-specificity test for small public-utility projects. Informs checks G01/G02 and N07 (buildings/utilities).

rules.subject: J NPV and Financial Liabilities
rules.clause: Section 2(d) (CA); credits toward CA, additional CA, penal CA, NPV & catchment area treatment plan
rules.notes: Statutory basis for NPV and compensatory levies (checks J01-J05, I01/I02). NPV determined by an expert committee constituted by the Central Government.

rules.subject: J NPV and Financial Liabilities
rules.clause: Rule 5(2) — utilisation of NPV funds; current MoEFCC/expert-committee NPV rate schedule
rules.notes: NPV rates vary by eco-class/canopy density (indicatively ~Rs 9.5-16 lakh/ha; VERIFY current rate schedule and revision date). Confirm eco-class & density used for NPV — checks J01/J02.

rules.subject: I Compensatory Afforestation
rules.clause: Accredited CA and eligibility for green credits
rules.notes: Accredited compensatory afforestation is also eligible for green credits. Confirm exact notification date. Relevant where accredited CA land is offered — checks I01/I04/I09.

rules.subject: K FRA and Rights
rules.act: Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers (Recognition of Forest Rights) Act, 2006 (2 of 2007)
rules.clause: Settlement of forest rights & Gram Sabha consent; read with MoEFCC/MoTA directions on FRA compliance stage
rules.notes: FRA compliance status and stage are mandatory fields (checks K01-K05). Confirm the current MoEFCC guideline fixing the stage at which FRA compliance / Gram Sabha documentation is required for forest diversion.

rules.subject: L Wildlife and Ecology
rules.clause: ss. 18/26A/35 (sanctuary/NP); s. 38V (tiger reserve/Critical Tiger Habitat); ss. 5A/6 (NBWL/SBWL); ESZ under EPA, 1986 s.3
rules.notes: Governs PA/ESZ/tiger-reserve intersection and the SBWL-NBWL-NTCA route (checks L01-L07, D08/D09). CWLW/NBWL comments and NTCA (s.38O) requirements where applicable; ESZ is notified under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.

rules.subject: B/L Judicial
rules.act: T.N. Godavarman Thirumulpad v. Union of India, WP(C) 202/1995 (Supreme Court) & CEC
rules.clause: 'Forest' in the dictionary sense (12.12.1996 order); CEC scrutiny layer
rules.notes: Applies the Adhiniyam to all areas that are 'forest' in the dictionary sense and to recorded/deemed forest; Central Empowered Committee oversight. Add case-specific IA / order references for individual proposals — checks B01/B02, L06.

rules.subject: A/S State procedure
rules.act: State Government instructions — Uttarakhand Forest Department
rules.clause: State-level scrutiny, Nodal Officer establishment, forwarding orders (populate with GO numbers)
rules.notes: Placeholder for current Uttarakhand shasanadesh / office memoranda governing State-level scrutiny and forwarding. Add GO numbers and dates — checks S01-S10.
